samples.title: Tide Times
samples.subtitle: Watch this one build live
samples.prompt: A tide times app for surfers. Show today's high + low tides for the nearest beach, with a glanceable Apple Watch complication and a haptic at the next low tide. Calm, ocean-aware UI.
samples.outcome: A real surfer would check this before paddling out.

samples.title: HabitFlow
samples.subtitle: Start your first real build
samples.prompt: A daily habit tracker. Three habits max, streaks shown as a horizontal flame, missed-day forgiveness once a week, a soft chime when the streak grows. Minimal, calming, no analytics.
samples.outcome: Tiny, sticky, the kind of thing you actually open every day.

samples.title: PodcastNotes
samples.subtitle: Start your first real build
samples.prompt: An app that listens alongside Podcasts and captures highlights. Tap the watch face during a listen → marks the moment. Daily digest summarises every highlight with a one-line takeaway.
samples.outcome: Stops the 'I heard a great quote and now I can't find it' problem.
